name: Exposure of File Descriptor to Unintended Control Sphere ('File Descriptor Leak')
description: A process does not close sensitive file descriptors before spawning a child process, allowing the child to perform unauthorized I/O operations using inherited descriptors that should have been restricted.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node holding an open file descriptor flows through a TRANSFORM node that forks or executes a child process (EXTERNAL node) without a CONTROL node closing or setting close-on-exec for the descriptor before the spawn
